items.title: - Drafted a blog post
items.description: - Drafted a blog post - Used an LLM to meticulously improve the argument over 4 hours. - Wow, feeling great, it’s so convincing! - Fun idea let’s ask it to argue the opposite. - LLM demolishes the entire argument and convinces me that the…
items.description_zh: - 起草了一篇博客文章 - 使用LLM在 4 个小时内精心改进了论点。 - 哇，感觉棒极了，太有说服力了！ - 有趣的想法，让我们让它提出相反的观点。 - LLM推翻了整个论点并使我相信......

items.title: False equivalence is a trap I’ve been consciously steering away from in my work the last…
items.title_zh: 错误对等是我在过去的工作中有意识地避开的一个陷阱……
items.description: False equivalence is a trap I’ve been consciously steering away from in my work the last 5 years. in Zuck’s case it cost him @GoogleDeepMind. in content/strategy it is common to go wide than deep: “oh we do a, b, c, and d” and put equal we…
items.description_zh: 错误对等是我在过去 5 年的工作中一直有意识地避开的陷阱。就扎克而言，这让他付出了代价@GoogleDeepMind。在内容/策略中，广度大于深度是很常见的：“哦，我们做a、b、c和d”，并把我们等于……

items.title: Interesting to see how many fast growing companies like @linear and @tryramp want to hire…
items.title_zh: 有趣的是，有多少像 @linear 和 @tryramp 这样快速发展的公司想要招聘……
items.description: Interesting to see how many fast growing companies like @linear and @tryramp want to hire ex-founders as PMs. I think this is a good litmus test for how good your company is at attracting talent: 1. Do founders want to work here? 2. Do the…
items.description_zh: 有趣的是，有多少像 @linear 和 @tryramp 这样快速发展的公司想要聘请前创始人作为产品经理。我认为这是一个很好的试金石，可以检验您的公司在吸引人才方面的表现： 1. 创始人愿意在这里工作吗？ 2. 做……

items.title: AI enables everyone to build apps, which leaves the best engineers to focus a layer deepe…
items.title_zh: 人工智能使每个人都能够构建应用程序，这使得最好的工程师能够更深入地关注......
items.description: AI enables everyone to build apps, which leaves the best engineers to focus a layer deeper and do more ambitious things to advance the platforms themselves and expand what’s possible. This is what I meant when I started talking about “the…
items.description_zh: 人工智能使每个人都能够构建应用程序，这使得最优秀的工程师能够更深入地关注并做更雄心勃勃的事情，以推进平台本身并扩展可能性。这就是我开始谈论“……”时的意思。
